statements.sql: select * from `users` where `id` = 20 limit 1
select * from `settings` where `created_by` = 2
select `name`, `id` from `venders` where `created_by` = 2
select count(*) as aggregate from `purchases` where `created_by` = 2

select * from `product_service_categories` where `product_service_categories`.`id` in (1)

select `permissions`.*, `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` as `pivot_permission_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `permissions` inner join `model_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` = 20 and `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` = 'App\Models\User'

select `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` where `model_has_roles`.`model_id` in (20) and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\Models\User'
